𝗗𝗥𝗢𝗜𝗗𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗞 | Transforming an Android phone into a portable Linux PC capable of running a wide range of desktop applications.  🌟 Rising Fast!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Transforming an Android phone into a portable Linux PC capable of running a wide range of desktop applications.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: May 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Run full Linux desktop on Android
✅ Direct kernel access, no emulation
✅ Support for XFCE4, LXQt, MATE, KDE desktop environments
✅ Install and run applications like VS Code, LibreOffice, Blender, Wireshark, Metasploit, and local AI
✅ X11 and VNC support for display
✅ Optional Raspberry Pi bridge for monitor output on phones without USB-C display out
✅ Automatic menu syncing for Proot installed applications
✅ GPU acceleration setup


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.4K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 142 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 6 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

DroidDesk enables users to run a full Linux desktop environment on their Android phone, leveraging Termux, Termux X11, and Proot. It allows for the installation and execution of various Linux applications, including development tools, office suites, and even demanding software like Blender, with support for both on-device display and external monitor output via USB-C or a Raspberry Pi bridge.

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/orailnoor/DroidDesk

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

👉 GitHub Open Source: https://t.me/GitHub_Open_Source

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗩𝗜𝗕𝗘-𝗗𝗥𝗔𝗪 | To enable users with little to no 3D modeling experience to easily create and build 3D worlds from simple 2D sketches.  🌟 Rising Fast!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enable users with little to no 3D modeling experience to easily create and build 3D worlds from simple 2D sketches.
📅 Created: Mar 2025 • Updated: May 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Sketching on a 2D canvas
✅ AI-powered drawing enhancement
✅ 2D sketch to 3D model conversion
✅ 3D world building
✅ Iterative editing of 3D models via sketching or text prompts
✅ One-click glTF export


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 289 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 6 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Vibe Draw is a TypeScript-based application that transforms rough 2D sketches into detailed 3D models and worlds. It allows users to draw, enhance, convert to 3D, build within a 3D environment, and export their creations in glTF format.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/martin226/vibe-draw

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗠𝗔𝗖-𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗜𝗧 | To provide users with a detailed inventory and analysis of all software and related components installed on their macOS system, aiding in system management, cleanup, and understanding.  

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with a detailed inventory and analysis of all software and related components installed on their macOS system, aiding in system management, cleanup, and understanding.
📅 Created: May 2026 • Updated: May 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Audits applications (Applications folder, Homebrew Casks, App Store, Login Items, VS Code extensions)
✅ Scans various programming language installations (Python, Node.js, Rust, Go, Ruby, Java, PHP, etc.)
✅ Detects AI/LLM models and related files (Ollama, LM Studio, GGUF, Safetensors)
✅ Inspects Docker images, containers, volumes, and compose projects
✅ Identifies DevOps tools (CLI tools for AWS/GCP/Azure, kubectl, Terraform, Ansible)
✅ Lists installed security tools (nmap, Burp Suite, Metasploit, Wireshark)
✅ Analyzes disk usage (top folders by size, large files, caches)
✅ Modular design allowing for individual module scans
✅ Saves audit results to a text file on the Desktop


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐ 2 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 0 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

mac-audit is a comprehensive shell script designed to perform a full audit of installed software on macOS. It identifies applications, programming languages, AI/LLM models, Docker components, DevOps tools, security utilities, and disk usage, providing details on what is installed, where it is located, and its purpose.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/demureiskander/mac-audit

𝗤𝗡𝗢𝗧𝗘 | A lightweight, feature-rich desktop application for writing, organizing, and exporting notes in plain text and Markdown formats.  🔥 Super Hot!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A lightweight, feature-rich desktop application for writing, organizing, and exporting notes in plain text and Markdown formats.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: May 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Plain text and Markdown editing
✅ Live Markdown preview
✅ Formatting toolbar
✅ File history with search
✅ Version history
✅ PDF export (via typst)
✅ HTML export
✅ OCR (via tesseract)
✅ Dark and light themes
✅ Customizable appearance
✅ Synchronized scroll
✅ Custom window controls
✅ Cross-platform (Linux, Windows, macOS)

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

qnote is a minimal, cross-platform desktop note editor built with Tauri and React. It focuses on providing a clean interface for writing and managing notes, with features like Markdown support, live preview, file history, and PDF/HTML export.
